mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO AM2X_SUBMIT ( MSG_ID,
SUBJECT,
MSG_TYPE, SCHEDULE_TIME, SUBMIT_TIME, MESSAGE, CALLBACK_NUM, RCPT_DATA, K_ADFLAG, RESERVED01, RESERVED02, RESERVED03 ) VALUES ( AM2X_SUBMIT_SEQ.NEXTVAL,
#{subject},
#{msgType}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{message}, #{callbackNum}, #{rcptData}, #{kAdflag}, #{reserved01}, #{reserved02}, #{reserved03} )
